summary: Intent capture system with LLM-backed classification and keyword fallback; multilingual plain-language message catalog; --audience and --language CLI flags; A2A endpoints for intent/feedback loop.

components.name: drift.intent
components.description: Structured intent capture, classify, formalize, validate, verify pipeline with YAML contract storage
components.test_coverage: tests/test_intent.py, tests/test_intent_api.py, tests/test_intent_capture.py, tests/test_intent_feedback.py, tests/test_intent_loop.py, tests/test_intent_mcp.py, tests/test_intent_verify.py

components.name: drift.lang
components.description: Multilingual plain-language message catalog with enrich_human_messages(); graceful fallback when message key missing

components.name: cli --audience --language
components.description: New flags on drift analyze for non-technical stakeholders; effective_audience/effective_language resolution chain (flag > config > default)

components.name: a2a_router intent endpoints
components.description: capture_intent, verify_intent, feedback_for_agent skill endpoints wired into A2A dispatch table

components.name: drift.api intent surface
components.description: capture_intent(), verify_intent(), feedback_for_agent() exposed via drift.api public namespace

optional_dependency.fallback: keyword-only classification when litellm is not installed

self_analysis.scope: new modules only, no existing signal logic changed
self_analysis.precision_recall_impact: none (lang/intent modules do not affect signal detection)
